Get to know me

About Me

Cybersecurity researcher at Purdue University studying binary hardening, mechanistic interpretability, and embedded systems security. Active researcher through CERIAS and the Purdue Data Mine. Interested in the intersection of systems programming, compiler security, and machine learning interpretability.

Role

Cybersecurity Researcher & Student

Location

West Lafayette, IN

Experience

2+ Years of Experience

Education

Purdue University — B.S. Cybersecurity, Finance Minor

Languages

English Native
Croatian Native
Russian Conversational — actively learning

Tools & technologies

Arsenal

Security Tools

›
Wireshark — packet-level network forensics

Ghidra — NSA reverse engineering framework

C — systems programming & security research

Python — scripting & automation

Cisco Packet Tracer — network simulation & labs
›
TCP/IP — protocol analysis
›
Shodan — IoT reconnaissance

GCC — compiler toolchain & hardening flags

My work

Featured Projects

Personal Research

GCC Flag Simulations

Repository of documented C files simulating GCC hardening flag mechanisms in plain C without using the actual compiler flag. Each file demonstrates the injected mechanism with full documentation and is reproduced from memory before new material is added.

CGCCSecuritySystems Programming
security

Credentials

Certifications

Certification Professional Development In Progress

CompTIA Security+

In Progress

CompTIA

Industry-standard certification covering network security, threats, vulnerabilities, cryptography, identity management, and risk management. Foundational credential for cybersecurity careers.

Summer 2025 Actively Studying

CompTIA Network+

Planned

CompTIA

Vendor-neutral networking certification covering protocols, routing, switching, infrastructure, and network troubleshooting. Complements Security+ with deep network fundamentals.

2025 No link available

GICSP — Global Industrial Cyber Security Professional

Planned

GIAC

Specialized certification for industrial control system (ICS) and operational technology (OT) security. Highly relevant to embedded systems and critical infrastructure research.

Junior/Senior Year No link available

Notable Projects

GCC Flag Simulations C · GCC · Security · Systems Programming

Repository of documented C files simulating GCC hardening flag mechanisms in plain C without using the actual compiler flag. Each file demonstrates the injected mechanism with full documentation and is reproduced from memory before new material is added.
